description: Job offer with full salary and deadline — stage offer, action update_stage
subject: Job Offer — Senior Python Developer
raw_text:
Dear Kirill,

We are delighted to offer you the position of Senior Python Developer at Fintech Ventures GmbH, Berlin.

Offer details:
- Start date: August 1, 2026
- Salary: 92,000 EUR gross/year
- Work arrangement: Hybrid (3 days remote, 2 days Berlin office)
- Contract: Permanent (unbefristet)
- Probationary period: 6 months

Please review the attached contract and confirm your acceptance by June 20, 2026.

We look forward to welcoming you to the team.

Kind regards,
Markus Weber
Head of Engineering
Fintech Ventures GmbH
markus.weber@fintechventures.de
